nodes.name: Run Backfill
nodes.notes: Click 'Execute Workflow' to start the one-time backfill. PREREQUISITE: Export your Prosp.ai campaigns as CSV, then paste into a new Google Sheet tab called 'Prosp Export'. Required columns: First Name, Last Name, Email, LinkedIn URL, Company, Title, Campaign Status (connected/pending/replied).

nodes.name: Read Prosp Export Sheet
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from the 'Prosp Export' tab. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with your sheet. Columns expected: First Name, Last Name, Email, LinkedIn URL, Company, Title, Campaign Status.

nodes.name: Normalize Fields
nodes.notes: Normalizes column names from Prosp export. Handles variations in column naming.

nodes.name: Loop (1 at a time)
nodes.notes: Processes one contact at a time to respect Notion API rate limits (3 requests/sec).

nodes.name: Find Existing Contact
nodes.notes: Deduplicates by LinkedIn Profile URL or Email. If found, updates. If not, creates.

nodes.name: Status Priority Check
nodes.notes: Compares existing Notion status against Prosp status. Only advances status forward (never downgrades). Maps Prosp statuses: pending→Connection Sent, connected→Connection Accepted, replied→Responded.

nodes.name: Update Existing Contact
nodes.notes: Updates the existing Notion contact. Only advances status forward. Always sets LI Connection Sent checkbox.

nodes.name: Prepare New Contact
nodes.notes: Maps Prosp campaign status to Notion fields for new contact creation.

nodes.name: Create New Contact
nodes.notes: Creates a new Notion contact with all fields populated from Prosp export. Source = 'LI Loom Outreach'.

nodes.name: Rate Limit Delay
nodes.notes: 400ms delay between contacts to stay under Notion's 3 req/sec rate limit.
